candidate_definitions.text: A set of ready to use Agent Skills for research, science, engineering, analysis, finance and writing.

> **🔔 Claude Scientific Skills is now Scientific Agent Skills.** Same skills, broader compatibility — now works with any AI agent that supports the open [Agent Skills](https://agentskills.io/) standard, not just Claude.
Intelligent automation and multi-agent orchestration for Claude Code
> **⚡ Updated for Opus 4.7, Sonnet 4.6 & Haiku 4.5** — Three-tier model strategy for optimal performance
Native macOS menu bar app to use your Claude Code & ChatGPT subscriptions with AI coding tools - no API keys needed
A collection of my favorite custom Claude Code resources to make life easier.
A growing collection of custom Claude Code resources built for real workflows.
Thoughtbox is an intention ledger for agents. Evaluate AI's decisions against its decision-making.

**Multi-agent collaborative reasoning that's auditable.** Thoughtbox is a Docker-based MCP server where AI agents coordinate through shared workspaces — claiming problems, proposing solutions, reviewing each other's work, and reaching consensus. Every step is recorded as a struc…
